programme.title: The Tournament: A History of ACC Men's Basketball
programme.desc: When Indiana native Everett Case arrives in Raleigh to become the coach at North Carolina State, his vision spearheads not just the rise of college basketball at his school and in the region, but the start of a conference that will change the sport.

programme.title: The Tournament: A History of ACC Men's Basketball
programme.desc: From Frank McGuire to Bones McKinney and Vic Bubas, new coaches emerge to challenge the early success of Everett Case. It all precedes a final poignant moment of triumph for Case at the only home the ACC Tournament has, until this point, ever known.

programme.title: The Tournament: A History of ACC Men's Basketball
programme.desc: After a rough start, North Carolina's Dean Smith comes to be known for both dominance and dignity, playing a central role in desegregating the ACC with the recruitment of Charlie Scott, who emerges as a star on some of Smith's greatest teams.

programme.title: The Tournament: A History of ACC Men's Basketball
programme.desc: An intense and high-impact rivalry develops between Maryland and North Carolina State, capped by the finale of the 1974 ACC Tournament in arguably the greatest college basketball game ever - and a battle that helps shape the future of the sport.

programme.title: The Tournament: A History of ACC Men's Basketball
programme.desc: Dean Smith's North Carolina teams may be the class of the ACC, but rivals also flourish, including a Virginia team led by Wally Walker, and a Duke program that re-emerges with a championship run in 1978 and a controversial title two years later.

programme.title: The Tournament: A History of ACC Men's Basketball
programme.desc: Virginia's Ralph Sampson earns national player of the year honors three times, but never wins the ACC Tournament. Dean Smith seeks a title with freshman Michael Jordan, and the charismatic Jim Valvano leads NC State on a memorable Cinderella run.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Next Generation
programme.desc: The next generation must be resourceful tackling late winter challenges.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: Glenn returns to his remote camp after months away. With grizzlies active in the area, he doesn't know what to expect.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: Sue is locking down camp and heading to Deadhorse to pick up a new eight-wheel all-terrain vehicle.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: Sue begins the 85-mile journey through the Alaskan tundra on her new all-terrain vehicle, back to her home in Kavik.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: Chip is planning to go caribou hunting with his son Jon, but Jon is late and the family becomes concerned.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: A snowstorm threatens Sue's camp; Chip and Agnes prepare to leave for their annual hunting trip.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: The end of the winter season is quickly approaching, giving Chip and Agnes Hailstone one last chance to harvest fat caribou.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: Summer is arriving quickly in the remote Arctic of Alaska, and change is sure to come with it.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: Life returns to Alaska, but the Arctic wilderness remains challenging.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: Two daughters are put to the test, hunting caribou to survive off the land; an ambitious project to reduce the strain of physical labor; a sense of urgency leads to a new tool; the costs of flying in produce.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: Unpredictable weather hits as summer draws near; Sue Aikens gathers food to prepare for winter, but when caribou are scarce she is forced to try her hand at fishing.

programme.title: Life Below Zero

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern prepares chicken fried axis deer. Next, Chef Zimmern poaches halibut in tomato roux.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern showcases quail two ways: classic Southern fried quail with lemon-basil aioli, and as an elevated topping for a traditional open-fire paella, complete with crispy socarrat. He proves this small bird makes an extraordinary dinner.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern takes a spin on Nashville-style hot fried chicken. Hot and spicy, batter coated, crispy fried pheasant is paired with a spinach salad topped with bacon vinaigrette and ice cold mint basil lemonade.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Andrew unlocks the rich flavor of guinea hen with a vibrant grilled salad featuring watercress and a mustard-hazelnut vinaigrette. Then, he slow-roasts a whole bird with Middle Eastern spices, served with harissa squash and eggplant-tahini purée.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern demystifies cooking clams, mussels and oysters.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores Minnesota's forests for wild mushrooms. He creates a simple grilled mushroom salad, then hand-shapes cavatelli pasta tossed with golden chanterelles, butter, garlic, thyme, and colatura. He shares foraging and cleaning tips.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Eggplant: A fruit you didn't know was a fruit. Often underrated and overlooked, Frankie shows us how to shop for and cook this filling, delicious, cost-effective, and versatile ingredient. Master these cooking techniques.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Frankie shows which cuts of meat provide the most bang for a consumer's buck, and equally as important, how to cook them for optimal flavor.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Frankie busts the myth that eating plant-based is expensive. Preparing these good-for-you meals is all about eating seasonally to save money on produce, and shopping the bulk aisle for even more savings on plant-based pantry items.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Frankie figured out the weekly budget grocery equation so you don't have to. Breakfast, lunch, and dinner for seven days, for a family of four, for under $150. All it takes is a little planning, meal prep, and using up leftovers in inventive ways.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Cheese can be really expensive. Frankie teaches us how to cook with more affordable cheese swaps than what might normally be called for in a recipe. More importantly, we learn how to stretch cheese in a dish so it can be the star.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Tomatoes are one of the most produced fruits, especially when in season. Frankie teaches us how to prepare them fresh in a variety of ways. And for even more savings, Frankie will share a few tips on how to preserve tomatoes.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Date night doesn't have to be at an over-priced, mediocre restaurant. Frankie prepares an affordable and delicious sushi date night at home, filled with three courses, plus tips on how to set date night ambiance at home on a struggle budget.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: A big way to save money on a struggle budget is to prepare homemade lunches for work. Frankie shows us how to make five delicious lunches for the whole work week. Each one flavored differently during meal prep so you don't get bored.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Flour has the super power to transform into an endless variety of meals, and a little goes a long way. Frankie teaches us how to make three different meals using flour as the affordable vehicle. Save money, learn new techniques.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: You say hotdishes, Frankie says casserole. Either way, these one-pot hotdishes are an affordable way to feed a group of people, or the family for dinner. Plus they're great to freeze for future meals.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Cancel the pizza delivery, it's time to save money and build your pies from scratch. With three different pizza styles, you're bound to find one that satisfies your craving without digging into your wallet.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Join Frankie to learn the ins and outs of using every part of a chicken, as he demonstrates how to maximize the value and minimize waste. By cooking smarter, you'll have three delectable recipes to last you the whole week.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Everyone knows Frankie can't live without pasta, but this week he shares his favorite Italian recipes that don't require any kneading. Add these simple, delicious dishes to your weeknight menu to complete your Italian dish repertoire.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: At a loss when your pantry is empty? With these recipes, you can walk into any grocery store with only $7 and walk out with everything you need for an entire meal. Because yes, you can whip up a nutritious meal at an affordable price!

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Send your taste buds on a first class food tour without even leaving the Struggle kitchen! Frankie whips up his favorite regional specialties from five destinations, making them as authentic as possible while sticking to his budget.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: It's dinnertime and breakfast is on the menu this week. These affordable breakfast specials are hearty enough for dinner, and so delicious they may even taste better after dark. Grab a fork and dig in for the most important meal of the day!

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Any true struggle cook knows there's nothing better than a one pot dinner. Not only is there hardly any cleanup at the end, but the prep is minimal too, which means hunger satisfaction is imminent. Who says meals can't be cheap, easy and delicious?

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Last minute company leaving you in a pinch? Frankie has you covered with these easy recipes featuring store bought staples. With a few Struggle tips, these basic ingredients can be transformed into dishes that will impress your guests.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Going green isn't just a trend; it's a no-brainer! When the veggies are in season and the prices are at their lowest, Frankie's colorful recipes and zero waste tips will have you celebrating the savings with fresh spring produce.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Is it a burger? Is it a sandwich? Is a burger a sandwich? Not even Frankie knows the answer, but one thing is certain: whatever you want to call them, these fun twists and familiar flavor combos are super satisfying to scarf down.

programme.title: La reina del flow
programme.desc: Yeimy Montoya paga una injusta condena en Nueva York tras haber sido engañada por el hombre que amaba. Por lo tanto, hace un pacto con las autoridades judiciales para capturar al hombre que asesinó a su familia.

programme.title: Pantanal
programme.desc: José Leôncio, hacendado del Pantanal, deja a una joven embarazada en una visita a Río de Janeiro. Ella va a vivir con él al Pantanal, pero es infeliz y decide volver a la ciudad con su hijo. Veinte años después, este va en busca de su padre.

programme.title: Jesús
programme.desc: La trayectoria de Jesucristo antes de la resurrección. Sus milagros y el calvario de la cruz. Las vidas de quienes fueron curados por Jesucristo y quiénes eran los apóstoles.

programme.title: Destinos cruzados
programme.desc: Toprak despierta de un coma tras cinco años sin recordar nada de su pasado, y regresa a una familia que no reconoce, incluida su prometida de toda la vida y un niño que vive con él. Sin embargo, su amnesia lo mantiene en una incertidumbre constante.

programme.title: La luz de mi vida
programme.desc: Tras la muerte de su esposo Hakan, Elif descubre que él llevaba una doble vida y tenía una hija con una mujer llamada Firat.

programme.title: Bajo el mismo cielo
programme.desc: La historia de Carlos Martínez, un padre mexicano indocumentado que vive en Los Ángeles, un hombre trabajador y honrado que lucha para darle una mejor vida a sus dos hijos Luis y Rodrigo, pero su mayor temor es ser deportado y perder a su familia.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie explores Tunisia to meet traditional couscous makers, eat delicious street food, and get invited to cook with local chefs on a beach. Inspired by everything he sees, Jamie cooks crispy prawn parcels and a chicken and merguez sausage stew.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie heads to Greece, to the island of Skopelos, starting on the mainland in Thessaloniki. Inspired by meze plates and traditional island cuisine he cooks up a smoky aubergine flatbread and a lemony chargrilled chicken with tzatziki and rice.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: On a mission to taste the worlds best breakfast, the three big egos Gordon, Gino and Fred are venturing out of their comfort zones crossing over the USA boarder into Mexico. They hope to stay out of trouble as they drive their bad boy transporter.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: Gordon wants to show Fred & Gino that the food and fresh produce are off the charts! In Las Vegas they indulge in one of the most expensive beef burgers. After a night at the casino they're on the road again to experience the real wild west.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: Gino & Fred are excited to head to San Francisco for their very own Summer of Love. Gordon tries to embrace the flower power mood, but he's more interested in the 61 Michelin Stars. The boys travel to a Napa Valley vineyard in a hot air balloon.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: After four weeks on the road Gino's airing his feet in the back seat as the guys cruise along a Texan highway. Texas is a meat lovers paradise and Gordon is keen to show the Europhiles some of the best BBQ known to man.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: Gordon, Gino and Fred start their road trip in Gino's homeland of Italy, where Gino needs help to pull off an event that is close to his heart. Gino collects Gordon and Fred in a campervan to begin a road trip they won't be forgetting in a hurry.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: The trio heads to Scotland as Gordon prepares to cook a feast for the chief of Clan Ramsay and his friends. Gordon shows the others how to dress like real Scotsmen as they go in search of Scottish beef, hunt for scallops and play some Highland Games.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie is high up in the Italian Alps cooking some great comfort food, including dumplings, mind-blowing macaroni cheese, and a classic red wine and sausage risotto.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy

programme.desc: Gordon, Gino and Fred travel to Greece to immerse themselves in the culinary traditions. The taste buddies go island-hopping, keen to learn more about the Mediterranean diet and how the country has one of the healthiest populations in the world.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: The boys are in the Greek capital Athens in a vintage VW campervan. This is where high-concept cuisine originated & is still being re-invented, in a city known as the birth place of democracy and the cradle of western civilisation.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie visits the pizza capital of Italy to learn recipes from the locals and tries acquapazza, fish poached in crazy water.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: Corsica, the Island of Beauty, is best explored by railway; from Mediterranean waters to towering peaks, stops include Algajola for a seaside dive, Vizzanova on the GR20 trail and historic cities like Corte with its citadel.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: Andalusia, now crossed by high-speed and modernized rail lines, unveils its rich culture and landscapes; along the journey, we visit cities like Seville, Granada with its famed Alhambra and Guadix near the Tabernas desert.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: The Cinque Terre Express runs along Italy's northern coast east of Genoa; passing through five UNESCO-listed villages, it offers coastal views and access to cobbled streets, harbors, terraced vineyards and pastel-colored houses.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: The Little Yellow Train winds through the Eastern Pyrenees, crossing the Cerdan plateau, the historic Gisclard railway suspension bridge and the Grandes Canalettes caves, known as the underground Versailles of the Pyrenees.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: In Greece, the Intercity Express travels from Thessaloniki to Athens, passing sites like the Meteora peaks, Delphi ruins and the Acropolis; the journey continues to the Peloponnese on Greece's last cogwheel train.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.desc: Fred and his former boss, Chef Michel Roux Jr. are in Paris experiencing the signature dish of a classic restaurant and enjoying the simple pleasures of a perfect ham baguette.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.desc: Fred Sirieix is heading to Bristol for a winter treat in the company of Michel Roux Junior. Michel can't wait to show Fred his favourites, from the perfect French bistro to a festive countryside escape and Jamaican jerk turkey.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Leo (guest star Harry Connick Jr.) drags Grace on a scary cycling trip in the autumn countryside. Jason Marsden also guest stars.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will's aggressive new boss (Gene Wilder) orders him to fire his friend; Grace and Jack discover Karen is living out of her limousine.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace uses indecorous language when meeting Leo's parents; Jack's acting coach (Eileen Brennan) disparages his meager talent.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace begins to have cold feet as her relatives start arriving for her wedding, while Will tries to overcome his mixed emotions.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will is uneasy about the whole idea of Grace marrying Leo (guest star Harry Connick Jr.). Debbie Reynolds and Katie Couric also guest star.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will invites Karen to move in with him after she is kicked out of the Plaza Hotel; Elton John is an all-seeing arbiter of gay style.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace has only two tickets to "The Nutcracker" and cannot decide whether to take Will or Leo. Mary McDonough guest stars.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Jack convinces Will to join a gay soccer team; Karen is giddy in anticipation of her date with a handsome restaurateur (Andy Garcia).

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace is puzzled by her new neighbor -- a bizarre bohemian woman.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will and Jack coach Karen's cousin (Dan Futterman) on his new gay lifestyle, reminding Will of his own experience of coming out in 1986.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Karen's rival (Minnie Driver) attempts to manipulate Jack; Will and Grace revitalize their friendship with a night of board games.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Jack encounters his former babysitter (guest star Demi Moore) and lapses into childlike behavior. Rosanna Arquette and Leigh-Allyn Baker also guest star.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will and Jack's transformation of Karen's cousin Barry is complete; Karen duels with Beverly during a silent auction for charity.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Jealous Will spots Barry (Dan Futterman) disappearing with Jack; Karen trades places with Rosario to woo a handsome handyman (Bruno Campos).

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will forms an anti-romance club with Karen and his boss (Gene Wilder).

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will attempts to surprise Grace for her birthday by sneaking Leo back from Africa; Jack and Karen take their mission to keep Leo's return secret too seriously.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Karen's search for a roommate leads to a high-maintenance individual, who shares many of her eccentricities; Grace and Jack intervene when Will uses painkillers as a crutch.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Karen hires a somewhat immature divorce attorney (guest star Macaulay Culkin) to oppose Will in court.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: When Karen's ex-husband dies, she and her British rival (Minnie Driver) have a contest of wills; Leo (Harry Connick Jr.) is needed in Guatemala.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Karen confronts her ex-husband's mistress before inviting everybody for a ceremony on her yacht; Grace suffers from jealousy after meeting her husband's sexy co-worker.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will and Jack awake in a precarious position while at sea; Grace discovers love letters in Leo's bag from a female colleague.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace is vexed when she learns that Leo's ex-girlfriend (Mira Sorvino) is intimately acquainted with Will.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Karen invites Grace and Leo to play tennis at her exclusive club, but her fierce playing style drives Grace away.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Jack lands a speaking role opposite James Earl Jones in an off-Broadway play and gives the veteran actor some pointers.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will takes Leo on shopping sprees and for high tea to help him rekindle his love of the city; Karen coaches Jack for the annual gay spelling bee.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will takes his mother for an afternoon stroll and bumps into an attractive bachelor (Dylan McDermott); Karen continues her lifelong quest to hunt down hubby-stealing Lorraine.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: An unorthodox doctor (Jack Black) gives Karen her annual physical; Jack begs Will to support his decision to become a student nurse.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will urges Grace to stay in New York so they can spend some time together; Karen strong-arms Jack's nursing teacher into letting him skip class but still make the grade.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will catches the eye of a female diner after being stood up; Grace bumps into a man (Tom Everett Scott) with whom she once shared a forgettable encounter; Karen runs into her nemesis, Candice Bergen.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: A weak bladder forces Will to entrust Grace with his place in line for Barry Manilow tickets; Grace's mother (Debbie Reynolds) cancels their annual mother-daughter shopping trip to have dinner with Jack.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace's freeloading sister (Geena Davis) comes to town to launch her latest business enterprise; Karen spurns Lyle (John Cleese), then changes her mind after Lorraine (Minnie Driver) expresses her disapproval.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: A rich plastic surgeon (guest star Hal Linden) tries to buy Will's affection; Grace boycotts a new restaurant.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will's new client (Dave Foley) falls for Jack; Grace and Karen discover hidden money while trying to fix the plumbing in Leo's cabin.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will is the only single man in a cooking class full of couples, including Jack and his new boyfriend (Dave Foley); Karen's mother (Suzanne Pleshette) asks Grace to decorate her apartment.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will and Grace begin a business venture selling apartments; Jack runs into his former acting mentor, Zandra; Karen and Lyle (John Cleese) try to renew romance.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will and Grace try to break up Jack and Stuart (Dave Foley) so they can sell the apartment for a higher price; Karen demands that Lyle (John Cleese) discipline his daughter (Minnie Driver).

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Real-estate entrepreneurs Will and Grace face formidable competition on the East Side from a lesbian couple (Edie Falco, Chloe Sevigny); John Edward gives Karen some psychic guidance.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Jack and Grace stumble upon Stuart (Dave Foley) watching a movie matinee in the company of another man; Will tries to teach Karen how to drive.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace advises Will to play hard to get with his new boyfriend (Bobby Cannavale); Jack and Karen despair after learning their favorite TV series will be going off the air.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will introduces his new boyfriend (Bobby Cannavale) to overly critical Grace; Karen tells Jack that their friendship will change after her wedding.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: At Tina's (Lesley Ann Warren) urging, Will tries to find out if there is a new woman in his father's life; Jack's son decides to try out for the high-school cheerleading squad.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: On the eve of his graduation from nursing school, Jack turns to Will for help writing his commencement address.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Karen moves her wedding to Las Vegas, where Jennifer Lopez agrees to sing at the ceremony.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Karen moves her wedding to Las Vegas, where Jennifer Lopez agrees to sing at the ceremony.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Karen recruits Jack to help her get Jennifer Lopez to listen to Karen's new song; Grace takes out her frustration over her cheating husband on Will.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Jack wangles his way into Janet Jackson's (guest starring as herself) performance tour as a backup dancer.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: As she attempts to steal doughnuts at an AA meeting, Grace has a surprise reunion with Val (Molly Shannon); Will and Jack attend a gay television focus group meeting.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace accuses Will of being too nice to strangers; Jack has trouble at his new company when his co-workers mock him about his Cher doll.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Despite the fact that Will has never had a happy birthday, his new relationship with Vince (Bobby Cannavale) gives him hope that this one will be.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will convinces Jack to aid a local gay-bookstore owner to save his store from closing.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will and Grace decide to invite Vince and Nadine (Kristin Davis) over, but they quickly learn that, despite similarities in friendship, they are polar opposites.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: After a great date with someone else, Grace comes home to a garbled message from Leo; Karen and Jack try to set each other up, but things go awry.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will, Grace, Jack and Karen go on a road trip for Grace's getaway weekend, but Jack and Karen hate the car ride and bail on the plan.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Vince's mother cannot make her traditional holiday feast, so Will volunteers to make a special meal, but Vince's mother refuses to give him any credit; Jack gives Vince's sister (Jamie-Lynn DiScala) pointers on keeping secrets.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Vince's mother is unable to make her traditional holiday feast, so Will volunteers to make a special meal, but Vince's mother refuses to give Will any of the credit; Jack gives Vince's sister (Jamie-Lynn DiScala) pointers on keeping secrets.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace accidentally breaks a treasured figurine at Will's mother's (Blythe Danner) holiday party and blames it on another guest.

programme.title: Will & Grace
